Things to do to improve the channel

I currently want to get [[Immanuelle alter]] off of the main page due to branding conflicts and potential legal issues. 

Current amount of uploads to get this 

* 6 shorts (excluding scheduled ones)
* 7 livestreams (excluding [[200 subscriber special]])
* 5 long form videos

== Livestreams ==
Need to do two more streams. Completely covered up [[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] and will cover up the two [[Ibbaduelle]] streams with at least one Celeste stream, and likely another stream of a different nature if I can get through all of Celeste today.
{{Youtube channel}}

== See Also ==

* [[Videos]]
* [[Minor december outage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
